note: Contracts compile, tests pass (33/33, 100% branch coverage), and the deploy script was verified end-to-end against a local anvil. They are NOT yet broadcast to the Pharos testnet from this sandbox: the RPC host (testnet.dplabs-internal.com) is outside this environment's network allowlist, and no funded deployer/agent key is available here. To complete the deployment, run the command in `deployCommand` from an environment that can reach the RPC with a funded key; script/Deploy.s.sol overwrites the core fields of this file with the real addresses and deploy block.

verification.note: Verifier availability was NOT confirmed from this sandbox — the explorer/API host is also outside the allowlist. After deploy, try: forge verify-contract <address> src/TreasuryPolicy.sol:TreasuryPolicy --chain-id 688688 --verifier blockscout --verifier-url https://testnet.pharosscan.xyz/api . If the verifier endpoint is unavailable, set "attempted": true and "verified": false here and record the failure reason.
